message:
feat(core): add getopt parse helpers + GetoptArgMode (bd-go-1)

First sub-bead of bd-go-epic (port getopt + getopt_long to native
Rust). Lifts the pure parse helpers from
frankenlibc-abi/src/unistd_abi.rs into core.

frankenlibc-core/src/getopt/parse.rs:
- pub enum GetoptArgMode { None, Required, Optional }
  Optional is the GNU "::" extension.
- pub fn getopt_prefers_colon(optspec: &[u8]) -> bool
  Returns true when optspec starts with ':' (POSIX opterr toggle).
- pub fn getopt_arg_mode(optspec: &[u8], option: u8) -> Option<GetoptArgMode>
  Looks up an option char in optspec, returning its arg-acceptance
  mode or None if the char isn't present. Distinguishes "X" (None),
  "X:" (Required), "X::" (Optional GNU).

10 unit tests pass:
- prefers_colon_when_optspec_starts_with_colon, prefers_colon_alone
- arg_mode_missing_option_returns_none
- arg_mode_no_arg (3 chars), arg_mode_required (3 positions)
- arg_mode_optional_gnu (2 cases)
- arg_mode_does_not_confuse_colon_with_option
- arg_mode_first_match_wins_for_duplicate_option
- arg_mode_at_end_of_optspec
- arg_mode_leading_colon_doesnt_break_lookup

frankenlibc-abi rebuilds cleanly against the new core module.

Closes bd-go-1; bd-go-2 will add the GetoptState + step machinery.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+//! POSIX `<unistd.h>` `getopt` family — argument parsing.
+//!
+//! This module is a clean-room native Rust port of the helpers and
+//! state machine that previously lived in
+//! `frankenlibc-abi/src/unistd_abi.rs` (~391 lines, lines 2113-2510).
+//!
+//! Sub-bead 1 (this commit, bd-go-1) lifts the pure parse helpers
+//! into core. Sub-bead 2 will add the full state machine.
+//! Sub-bead 3 will wire the abi shims.
+
+pub mod parse;
+
+pub use parse::{GetoptArgMode, getopt_arg_mode, getopt_prefers_colon};
